text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the academy shop...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Brrr... I'm so cold...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Enough of your whining, Doto.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Have a glance at what lies behind us! There are
still a hundred packs of ice cream to get through!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay... I'll do what I can to eat them...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What in the?! There's no reason to eat them all!
Are you trying to clear out the ice cream shelves
or something?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wah, Fukukitaru? B-but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We won't get the special prize if we don't eat all
the ice cream bars...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Special prize?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Whoever finds the winning stick will win the
special prize—a Super Snug Carrot Blanket.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's a first-rate item that does away with all your
aches and fatigue in a single day's re—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urgh?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: King?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...I am bowing out from the mission temporarily!
This is not me admitting defeat, mind y—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Urk... Urrrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: KIIIIING?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... What to do now? No... I need to keep
eating...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Riddle me this, Doto. What if... and this is purely
hypothetical...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if you eat a hundred and don't find the
winning stick? Wouldn't it be better to stop while
you can?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If that were to happen... actually, if it does
happen—we'd just go to another shop to buy
more.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I may be useless, but if I find that winning stick... I
could, just maybe, achieve anything I want.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't... want to be this way forever. Bad at
everything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I want to learn to love myself and become an
Umamusume who can give it her all!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...I see. So you're making a prayer of sorts.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Then our meeting today must be the work of fate!
I shall supply you with a pile of lucky charms to
help you find a winning ice cream stick!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: F-Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No problem! I'll go to the classroom and get
everything to you in a jiffy! I've even got my
prized lucky charm—a winning ice cream stick
that I got ten years ago!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Th-thank you very much?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Meisho Doto continues to eat her
ice cream bars as Matikanefukukitaru cheers her
on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They would probably get through the ice cream
bars a lot quicker together, but I choose not to
interfere. That's when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I... I found it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto successfully wins the Super Snug
Carrot Blanket and puts it straight to use the
following day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Recovering from excessive consumption of ice
cream.
